description.value: You position yourself to rapidly spin your foot orb without moving, kicking up a thick plume of dust. Until the end of your next turn, any creature in your square (including yourself) becomes @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.Concealed], though they can't use this concealment to [[/act hide]] or [[/act sneak]], as normal for concealment where your position is still obvious. If you are in a sterile environment without significant dirt or dust on the floor, you have to instead rely on a reserve of detritus stored in your cilia. You cannot use this action again for 10 minutes, or until you Step or Stride into a dirty square.
